THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOK, JOANN B $10,784.87 PRINCIPAL, $875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $269.62 INTEREST, $28.00 COSTS, $194.26 RESPONDENT'S SHARE FILIN FEE, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,151.75
